personal_profile.headline: Engineering Manager
personal_profile.summary: Engineering leader with expertise in scaling teams.

bullets.text: Spearheaded the organizational migration from monolith to microservices, coordinating across 5 teams.
Defined the technical roadmap for the platform's 3-year growth strategy.
Mentored 10+ senior engineers, promoting 3 to lead roles.
Scaled the engineering team from 5 to 40 people while maintaining delivery velocity.
Implemented a new RFC process that reduced architectural bottlenecks by 30%.
Implemented API endpoints for the user onboarding flow.
Wrote unit tests for the payment processing module.
